Name: Mate's Education Pvt Ltd
Desc:
[

Mates International Education and Visa Services

,

Mate’s Education Pvt. Ltd is one of the pioneer education consultancies of Nepal that helps Nepali students obtain “Admission & Student Visa” to go to different countries, mainly Australia, Canada, UK, and New Zealand. What makes us unique is our ‘equal support’ to those returning to settle back in Nepal by grabbing the new career opportunities or unique business startup ideas. Hence, we are here to help you while going abroad to Learn to Achieve your dream, Earn the Recognition of your successful dignity and even if you wish to Return to Reflect your education, experience, and expertise in Nepal. Abroad Study Plan is not like reading one book or watching one movie or visiting your favorite place for leisure activities. More specifically, it’s not a matter of short span of time.

,

Instead, it’s a matter of your whole life which is based on your one particular ‘action’ that decides ‘what kind of life’ you will live ahead as consequences. In short, Abroad Study Plan is the “The Transition Phase” of your life which is based on your today’s action and that action is – Choosing the right consultancy.

,

There are thousands of education consultancies in the market and most of them were, perhaps, born yesterday. Nothing wrong with that, but if your whole Life is going to depend on that Consultancy and their Counselors, you should always choose the one that has a History, the Experience, The Team and the one that can ‘Assure’ your future in abroad or even when you return to Nepal. Like we said, we are here to assist you go and here to assist you return – as your Guide & as your Mate. But we are here in the whole journey of your lifetime.

,

Mates an educational consultancy, moreover an organization in itself is taken as an epitome in the field of abroad studies. The services rendered by this organization is considered as the reliable one which has made numerous students climb the staircase of Mates.

]

Name: Brilliant Education And Career Services Pvt. Ltd.
Desc:
[

Maximize your career opportunity with Brilliant from here to anywhere across the globe. With more than a decade of experience on counselling and handling international education affairs, we are the right choice for you.

,

Brilliant Education and career services (BECS) a well-established and vibrant educational consultancy is associated with umbrella organization and related to different education providers. BECS stands out one of the best educational institutions for its services, experiences, success stories, positive reviews and mainly its own vibrant working team. Moreover because of the extension of branch offices in various cities in Nepal, its fame has been accelerated. We have been successful in sending students of different levels and courses across the globe with thousands of students since 2005. Primarily, we had launched our programs aiming to send students to Australia, New Zealand, United Kingdom, Canada, Japan, South Korea, Denmark, Germany, Un....

,

I was very happy with their services and importance they gave me for directing me towards my dream destination. Delivering comfortable IELTS classes, providing guidance for  proper study aboard destinations to assisting me for all needed documentations and getting my visa approved Brilliant education has provided me a quality service. From taking IELTS classes to getting visa, though the process was long, I am delighted to share that Brilliant guided me in each and every steps and completed all this processes within 3 months. And I am privileged to be a part of this Brilliant family
